patch_description:
Enhance the RandomForest feature set with clinically-motivated features beyond just mean+std of 6D rotations. Adding:
1. Velocity (temporal diff) mean/std - captures bradykinesia (primary severe PD marker)
2. Range of motion (max-min) per joint - captures shortened stride and reduced arm swing
3. LR asymmetry mean/std - captures the asymmetric presentation of PD
4. Acceleration (2nd diff) mean/std - captures tremor and jerkiness
5. FFT power in tremor band (4-8Hz at 30fps) and stride band (0.5-2Hz) for lower-body joints
6. Percentile features (25th, 75th) for more robust statistics

These features directly correspond to the clinical PD biomarkers listed in the task description and should significantly improve class 2 (severe PD) discrimination.
